title: Nysza III

{{Quote|The Empire has begun construction on a communications bunker on Nysza III. Your orders are to destroy the bunker before it can be completed.|Commander Beatonn, in a holomessage to Fable Astin|<ref name="Journal8" />}}
'''Nysza III''', also known as '''Nysza''', was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] celestial body located in the [[Dalchon sector/Legends|Dalchon sector]]. At one point, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began the construction of a [[communications bunker]] there. By [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], however, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Harrier Infiltration Team]] under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]] [[Mission to Nysza III|destroyed]] the structure.

==Description==
Nysza III,<ref name="Journal8" /> also referred to simply as Nysza,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|118|Iscera}}</ref> was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="Journal8" /> situated in the [[Nysza system/Legends|Nysza system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Dalchon sector/Legends|Dalchon sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Iscera]]<ref name="CSWE" /> of the [[Iscera system/Legends|Iscera system]].<ref name="EAOC Iscera">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Iscera system/Legends|Iscera system]]</ref>

==History==
[[File:Fable_Astin_SWJ8.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Fable Astin led a Rebel Alliance mission to Nysza III.]]
At some point by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="0 ABY">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of {{JournalCite|8|Uhl Eharl Khoehng (short story)}} to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began the construction of a [[communications bunker]] on Nysza III, with a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] being established there.<ref name="Journal8" /> By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="0 ABY" /> [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Beatonn]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] communicated via [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] with the Rebel [[Harrier Infiltration Team]] and its [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]], tasking the team with [[Mission to Nysza III|destroying]] the Nysza III bunker before its completion.<ref name="Journal8" />

Although the mission was successful, it saw the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the team's [[technical officer]] [[Arecelis Acosta]]. Astin and her fellow Rebel [[Deke Holman]] subsequently escaped the bunker—in the process being forced to dive into a construction tunnel full of stagnant [[Water/Legends|water]]—and traveled to Iscera aboard their [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Prodigal]]''. There, nearly seventeen [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] after the completion of their objective, Astin deleted the stored message from Beatonn mentioning Nysza III. Not long thereafter, Astin—while still aboard the ''Prodigal''—experienced a [[Dream/Legends|nightmare]] in which she relived a distorted version of the mission to Nysza III.<ref name="Journal8" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nysza III first appeared in a dream in the short story "[[Uhl Eharl Khoehng (short story)|Uhl Eharl Khoehng]]," which was written by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] and published in the [[November]] [[1995]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|eighth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Journal8" /> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' introduced a shortened version of the celestial body's name,<ref name="CSWE" /> and the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Nysza [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Nysza III, in grid square R-17.<ref name="TEA" />
